name: neko
tagline: A self-hosted virtual browser streamed to clients over WebRTC
description: Neko is a self-hosted virtual browser running in Docker. It streams browser sessions as video to clients over WebRTC, making it ideal for collaboration, testing, or remote browsing with shared access.

features.title: Shared Browser Sessions
features.description: Share a browser session with multiple users

features.title: Real-Time Collaboration
features.description: Allow multiple users to interact simultaneously

features.title: Media Playback
features.description: Watch videos together in a shared session

features.title: Access Control
features.description: Control who can join and interact

features.title: Self-Hosted Deployment
features.description: Run the service on your own infrastructure
